title: Support implementing an userdefined mtask
body:
## What would you like added/supported?

I'm trying to investgate the partition algorithm based on verilator, I wanna define my own mtask like this:
```
mtask0: 
[
top/sub_instance0/sub0_instance0,
top/sub_instance0/sub0_instance1,
top/sub_instance1/sub0_instance0
]
mtask1:
[
top/sub_instance1/sub1_instance0,
top/sub_instance2/sub2_instance1,
top/sub_instance2/sub2_instance0
]
```
then use verilator to explore my algorithm.

## May we assist you in trying to fix this yourself?

I have no previous knowledge to verilator, I wanna have a basic idea in how to implementing this. If there are more assistances that would be better.
code_blocks:
mtask0: 
[
top/sub_instance0/sub0_instance0,
top/sub_instance0/sub0_instance1,
top/sub_instance1/sub0_instance0
]
mtask1:
[
top/sub_instance1/sub1_instance0,
top/sub_instance2/sub2_instance1,
top/sub_instance2/sub2_instance0
]
